test.command: cd frontend && bun test; cd backend && cargo test

typecheck.command: cd frontend && npm run check; cd backend && cargo check

blockingIssues.description: SSR load in frontend/src/routes/+page.server.ts does not forward URL filter params (`type`/`ack`) to workspace bootstrap query params (`video_type`/`acknowledged`), causing first-paint filtered URLs to potentially render an unfiltered snapshot until hydration refreshes.

deleteHighlight() invalidates grouped highlight cache but fails to evict cached per-video highlights when videoId is unknown, allowing stale /api/videos/{videoId}/highlights responses to persist until TTL expiry.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md Frontend Data Layer section to reflect SSR bootstrap usage, targeted frontend cache invalidation, and self-hosted font state.

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill-procedure adherence mismatch in frontend-font-optimization transcript (library reads not visible while skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true)
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous transcript evidence; skeleton may be incomplete and does not conclusively prove procedure violation
